appDesc.message: Your tabs stay yours: sync tabs, groups & bookmarks to a private GitHub Gist or your own Forgejo. No servers, no tracking.

popupNoToken.message: Connect a GitHub token to start syncing your tabs.

popupForgejoNoAccess.message: Access to $1 isn't granted. Reconnect in Settings.

msgNoProfilesYet.message: No profiles yet. Create your first one.

promptSeedChoice.message: Start "$1" empty or from current tabs?

valNameExists.message: A profile with a similar name already exists.

confirmDeleteProfile.message:
Delete profile "$1"? This removes it from the Gist and cannot be undone.

Type the profile name to confirm:

msgAddedTabs.message: Added $1 tab(s) to master, $2 duplicate(s) skipped.

msgNothingToPull.message: Nothing to pull — everything is already open.

confirmReplaceLocalBody.message:
Replace local with master?

This CLOSES every tab in this window and reopens the $1 master tab(s) exactly. Unsaved local tabs will be lost.

msgNothingOpenedUntouched.message: Nothing could be opened — the window was left untouched.

msgLocalReplaced.message: Local replaced with $1 tab(s) from master.

confirmReplaceMasterBody.message:
Replace master with local?

This OVERWRITES profile "$1" with the current window ($2 tab(s)). The previous master content is discarded.

msgMasterReplaced.message: Master replaced with $1 tab(s) from this window.

confirmUseProfileBody.message:
Use "$1"?

This CLOSES every tab in this window and reopens the $2 tab(s) from that profile. Unsaved local tabs will be lost.

msgNothingStillUsing.message: Nothing could be opened — still using '$1'.

msgUpdated.message: Updated '$1' with $2 tab(s) from this window.

msgAddedBookmarksMaster.message: Added $1 bookmark(s) to master, $2 duplicate(s) skipped.

confirmReplaceLocalBookmarks.message:
Replace local bookmarks with master?

This DELETES every bookmark on this bar and recreates the $1 master bookmark(s) exactly.

msgLocalBookmarksReplaced.message: Local bookmarks replaced with $1 bookmark(s) from master.

confirmReplaceMasterBookmarks.message:
Replace master bookmarks with local?

This OVERWRITES the stored bookmark set with this bar's $1 bookmark(s). The previous stored bookmark set is discarded.

msgMasterBookmarksReplaced.message: Master bookmark set replaced with $1 bookmark(s) from this bar.

popupRecreateRepoConfirm.message: The tabula-data repo wasn't found (it may have been deleted). Recreate it?

popupRecreateGistConfirm.message: The Kartela gist wasn't found (it may have been deleted). Recreate a fresh private gist?

popupRepoNotFound.message: Repo not found. Reconnect in Settings.

popupGistNotFound.message: Gist not found. Reconnect in Settings.

msgSelectFirst.message: Select or create a profile first.

errNetworkGithub.message: Network error — check your connection and try again.

errAuthGithub.message: Invalid or expired token. Re-enter your GitHub token in Settings.

errRateLimit.message: GitHub rate limit reached. Try again after $1.

errForbiddenGithub.message: GitHub refused the request (403). Check the token's gist scope.

errProfileGoneGist.message: Profile "$1" no longer exists in the gist.

errNetworkForgejo.message: Network error — check your connection and the instance URL.

errAuthForgejo.message: Invalid or expired token. Re-enter your Forgejo token in Settings.

errProfileGoneRepo.message: Profile "$1" no longer exists in the repo.

settingsLead.message: Kartela stores your tab profiles in your own private storage. Pick a backend and connect to get started.

settingsGithubHintHtml.message: The token needs only the gist scope. How to create a token

settingsForgejoHintHtml.message: The token needs repository read/write scope. Create one on your instance under Settings → Applications → Generate New Token. Profiles are stored in a private repo named tabula-data (created automatically).

settingsAutoLead.message: Kartela normally syncs only when you press a button. These options let a background worker sync for you. Both toggles are independent and may be on at once.

settingsWarnReplaceHtml.message: Replace overwrites master with the focused window's tabs every interval — anything only in master is lost.

settingsBookmarksHint.message: When on, each timed sync also syncs your bookmarks bar to the backend using the same mode. Your local bookmarks are only ever read, never changed, by the background worker.

settingsSwitchSync.message: Sync the outgoing profile when you press Use this profile

settingsSwitchHintHtml.message: When you press Use this profile, this window is first synced into the profile you're leaving (before its tabs are replaced). Merely previewing a profile in the dropdown never syncs. Replace overwrites that outgoing profile's master with the current window.

settingsMigrateLeadHtml.message: Copy every profile from one backend to the other. Profiles are copied — the source is never changed, and your local tabs are never touched. Files with the same name on the target are overwritten.

settingsMigrateSwitch.message: Switch my active backend to the target after a successful migration

settingsPrivacyGithub.message: Your token and tabs go only to api.github.com. Kartela has no servers and collects nothing.

settingsPrivacyForgejo.message: Your token and tabs go only to your Forgejo instance. Kartela has no servers and collects nothing.

settingsConnectedForgejoReenter.message: Connected to Forgejo. Re-enter details to replace.

settingsConnectedGithubReenter.message: Connected. Enter a new token to replace it.

settingsConnectedAs.message: Connected as $1. You're ready to sync.

settingsInvalidUrl.message: That doesn't look like a valid URL.

settingsPermissionDeclinedSave.message: Permission to access $1 was declined. Nothing was saved.

settingsConnectedForgejoAs.message: Connected to $1 as $2. You're ready to sync.

settingsDisconnectedForgejo.message: Disconnected. Your Forgejo repo was not deleted.

settingsDisconnectedGithub.message: Disconnected. Your Gist was not deleted.

settingsMigrateConnectHint.message: Connect $1 first with the backend selector above (Validate & Save). Doing so switches your active backend — you can switch it back here after the migration, or with the selector.

settingsMigrateConfirm.message:
Migrate all profiles from $1 to $2?

• Every profile is COPIED $1 → $2.
• Target files with the same name WILL BE OVERWRITTEN.
• The source ($1) is never modified, and your local tabs are never touched.

settingsBothConnected.message: Both backends must be connected first.

settingsForgejoUrlInvalid.message: The stored Forgejo URL is invalid. Reconnect Forgejo in the connection card above.

settingsPermissionDeclinedMigrate.message: Permission to access $1 was declined. Nothing was migrated.

settingsNoProfilesBookmarksOnly.message: No profiles on $1 — migrated bookmarks only.

settingsNoProfiles.message: No profiles found on $1 — nothing to migrate.

bgSkippedMultiWindow.message: Skipped auto-replace: multiple windows and none focused
